settings.title: A fierce woman
settings.pull_quote: I want to create for me and for those who come after me, a life with better opportunities.
settings.intro_body: ARCHETYPE was not born in a laboratory. It was born in a kitchen in Brussels, from late nights, a crying baby, botanical research, and an unshakeable belief that women deserve more from their haircare.
settings.ch2_title: A daughter, a question, and essential oils.
settings.ch3_title: A kitchen becomes a cosmetics lab.
settings.closing_quote: All of my life experiences are part of my professional journey, because they have built who I am today.
